# nerdctl_image_save (Action)

Saves images to a tar archive with `nerdctl save`. The archive is written on the target host, not the machine running Terraform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "nerdctl_image_save" "archive" {
  config {
    images = ["traefik:v3", "nginx:alpine"]
    output = "/srv/images/bundle.tar" # written on the target host
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `images` (List of String) Image references to save.
- `output` (String) Path on the target host to write the tar archive to.
